title: Untitled Anticheat
body:
📌 Untitled1 – A Paper Plugin for Minecraft 1.21+
Untitled1 is a lightweight Paper plugin built for Minecraft 1.21 and above, designed to enhance your server with clean, modern Adventure API chat features. Whether you want improved messages, custom formatting, or simply a solid base for your own development, this plugin has you covered.

✨ Features
✅ Adventure API support for rich text and colors

✅ Built for Java 21 and Paper 1.21

✅ Fully shaded dependencies – no conflicts with other plugins

✅ Lightweight and optimized for performance

📦 Installation
Download the latest release from Modrinth.

Place the .jar file in your server’s plugins folder.

Restart your server.

Enjoy the new features!

🛠 Technical Info
Platform: Paper (and forks like Purpur, Folia)

Minecraft Version: 1.21+

Java Version: 21

Dependencies: None required

API Used: Adventure API 4.14.0

📜 License
This project is open-source and free to use.
